message:
fix: add ci-cd category to widget registry test assertions (#8620) (#8622)

PR #8611 added CI/CD cards with category 'ci-cd' to the widget registry,
but the test's allowed-category lists were not updated, causing the
"each card has required fields" assertion to fail.

Fixes #8620

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
